titleStmt.title: SII 40.167: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 167. (A.R. No. B. 302 of 1931.) Gannavaram, Palnad Taluk, Guntur District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a stone lying in a field called Chākalavānichēnu in the village.
This is dated Śaka 1542, Durmati, Āshāḍha, śu. 15.
Registers the grant of a field by a certain Rāmarāju Jaṅgamayya to the washerman Bābu of Tāḍuvāyi.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīrāma svasti śrī śālivāhana śaka varṣaṁbbulu
1542 Agunēṭi durmmatināma saṁvatsara Āṣāḍha śu 15 lu
rāmarāju jaṁggamayyagāru tāḍuvāya cākalabābu
ku yiccina caliguḍḍala tumurugōṭi śīmalōna yi jā
gīrulō nāmuganadarāḷa nādūri balicalli Aṁdu ḍu
vittula guḍḍamu mānyamu yistimi ganaka māmānyaniki cēnu paḍa
gaṭṭu tūrppuku vābharājucēnu dakṣaṇānaku palle maṭlacēnu paḍa
maṭa Ākula nāgireḍḍi cēnunnu madhyagānu yistimi gana
ka Adiphala parucuka Aṁdula ceṁdina paṁṭṭayiru
gāru nī putra pautra pāraṁparyaṁ Anubhaviṁci bra
tikēdi yiṁdku yavvaru dappinānu kāśilō gōvu
brahmaṇni vadhiṁccina pāpāna bōvuvāru gā
ḍida kaḍupuna buṭṭuvāru śrīrāma . yiṁddu
lōnu māmānyapu cēlōdi yirusa vittula di
nnigrāmatāluku polaṁ yirusavittuladinni
śrīrāmā .
Digital edition of SII 40.167 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
